channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Piedmont neutralizes Oakland Tech’s height advantage, wins NorCal opener in a stunning rout
item.description: Freshman Janelle Solis leads Piedmont past Oakland Tech in NorCal Division I regional. 'She’s better than advertised,' Tech coach says.
item.dc:creator: Devin Bradshaw, correspondent, The Mercury News

item.title: Weathering early Valley Christian surge, visiting Oakland High finds its footing and overpowers Warriors
item.description: Oakland High overcame a late arrival and a double-digit first-quarter deficit, running away with a win over Valley Christian in the CIF NorCal Division II opening round in San Jose
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Mavericks star Kyrie Irving has a torn ACL and is out for the season
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Dallas Mavericks star Kyrie Irving has a torn ACL in his left knee and will miss the rest of the season, the biggest setback in a season full of them for a team that traded superstar Luka Doncic.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Bodybuilder Jodi Vance dead at 20 as trainer claims 'serious error' led to fatal heart attack
item.description: Bodybuilder Jodi Vance has died at just 20 years old after suffering a fatal heart attack due to severe dehydration, her family revealed in a social media post
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cowboys and defensive tackle Osa Odighizuwa agree on $80M, 4-year contract, agent says
item.description: The Dallas Cowboys and defensive tackle Osa Odighizuwa agreed Tuesday on an $80 million, four-year contract with $58 million guaranteed, his agent said. The agreement came a few hours before the deadline for clubs to apply the franchise tag on one player.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Vikings decline franchise tag option for Sam Darnold despite breakout season: report
item.description: While Sam Darnold largely thrived his first season with the Vikings, the quarterback's future in Minnesota is murky after the team opted against using its franchise tag for him.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Top NJ wrestler Anthony Knox Jr charged with simple assault for alleged role in viral tournament brawl
item.description: Top New Jersey high school wrestler Anthony Knox Jr. was charged with simple assault for his alleged role in a tournament brawl late last month.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Times Square boxing event in May promises to be big, with 3 fights and talk of half a million fans
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Big boxing in New York for long meant Madison Square Garden, in recent years Barclays Center as well. Fight night in Times Square promises to be a whole different scene.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: California college faces backlash for replacing men's, women's locker rooms with all-sex locker rooms
item.description: UC Davis has announced plans to convert its men's and women's locker rooms at recreation centers into “universal" all-sex locker rooms.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jets release wide receiver Davante Adams as new regime continues roster overhaul
item.description: Davante Adams’ reunion with Aaron Rodgers lasted just 11 games with the New York Jets. The team released the veteran wide receiver Tuesday, ahead of the start of the NFL’s new league year next week. The move, which was expected, will save the Jets $29.9 million in salary cap space.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Shoeless Joe Jackson's personal scrapbooks hit auction
item.description: There are about 118 pages in the scrapbook that contain various newspaper articles, box scores, summaries of baseball games and photographs of Jackson mounted to the pages.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, NewsNation

item.title: Cooper Flagg, No. 2 Duke beat Wake Forest 93-60 to claim at least share of ACC regular-season crown
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Freshman Cooper Flagg had 28 points, eight rebounds and seven assists in possibly his final home game, helping No. 2 Duke beat Wake Forest 93-60 on Monday night to clinch at least a share of the Atlantic Coast Conference regular-season title.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Diego FC officials denounce homophobic chant heard at inaugural home match
item.description: "What took place during our first-ever home match does not reflect who we are as a club or the values we stand for," SDFC officials said in a statement Monday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: RSL shuts out Seattle in MLS home opener, 2-0
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Having scored just one goal in its first three games of the 2025 campaign, Real Salt Lake got some help from the Seattle Sounders on its way to a 2-0 victory in its MLS home opener Saturday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: CMU Baseball explodes at the plate for dominant double-header sweep
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — On an absolutely picturesque day for baseball at The Diamond at the Bus Bergman Sports Complex, CMU trailed MSU Billings 2-0 early. A 2-run shot to right by MSU's River Smith in the top of the 2nd put the Mavs in a hole.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Father convicted in shooting of St. Louis youth football coach over son's playing time
item.description: Jurors have convicted a father in the shooting of a St. Louis youth football coach following an apparent dispute over his son's playing time.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, NewsNation

item.title: Bountiful 3-peats with another 5A state title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Bountiful girls basketball team has built a true dynasty. The Redhawks knocked off previously undefeated West High to win its third straight state championship Friday night at the Huntsman Center, 57-47.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego FC home opener: Where to watch outside Snapdragon Stadium
item.description: After a stunning win against the Los Angeles Galaxy in its Major League Soccer debut, San Diego FC is set to make its first-ever appearance on the club's home turf on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Tight ends and defensive backs
item.description: At the NFL Scouting Combine, defensive backs and tight ends are going through drills at Lucas Oil Stadium, with prospects like Gunnar Helm, Harold Fannin Jr., Malaki Starks, Sebastian Castro, and Kevin Winston Jr. showcasing their skills and potential to contribute to NFL teams.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bay Area rap legend to perform at Oakland Roots opener
item.description: (KRON) -- Bay Area rap icon Too Short has been announced as the halftime entertainment for the Oakland Roots Soccer Club's home opener next month. The Roots will play their 2025 season opener on Saturday, March 22 against San Antonio FC.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Wrestling at Frontwave Arena: a preview with Thunder Rosa
item.description: All Elite Wrestling (AEW) is set to bring an action-packed night to Oceanside's Frontwave Arena on Wednesday, with stars like Thunder Rosa, a trailblazer in women's wrestling, ready to take center stage.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5
